text.title: Ev For Fixed Bid Outsource — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the engagement fixed-bid, >= 6 weeks, with a WBS sized 1-5% per package, and weekly cost-tracking resolution?

branch.when: contract_type == 'fixed-bid' AND duration_weeks >= 6 AND wbs_package_size_pct >= 1 AND wbs_package_size_pct <= 5 AND cost_tracking_grain == 'weekly'
branch.conclusion: Run both ledgers: ledger-A (client scope) and ledger-B (vendor margin). Apply CPI-C / SPI-S thresholds + change-request dual-update rule.
Block. Re-baseline the WBS into 1-5% packages first — coarser granularity hides margin burn.
Skip. Use generic EVM (T&M) or a lighter check (small engagement) instead.
